summary:
Iteration 53 — V2 Premium UI/UX dark obsidian refonte. BACKEND 11/11 pytest passed (test_iteration_53.py). FRONTEND extensively verified on mobile 390x844 — all 14 review_request bullets validated except 1 minor naming inconsistency on /api/v2/quota and 1 React hydration error (nested buttons in daily-advice).

BACKEND VERIFIED (11/11 PASS):
- GET /kolo-mark-v5-128.png and /kolo-mark-v5-256.png → HTTP 200 image/png.
- POST /api/v2/auth/send-email-code → returns dev_code in preview.
- POST /api/v2/auth/verify-email-code with bad code → 400/401/403.
- GET /api/v2/me, /api/v2/dashboard, /api/v2/reminders?date=YYYY-MM-DD, /api/v2/notifications/unread all return 200 with valid JSON.
- GET /api/v2/quota returns is_pro/contacts_used/limit/left + prospecting_used_this_week/limit_per_week/left_this_week + prospecting_window. NOTE: review_request expected fields named 'free_contacts_left/limit' and 'has_pro' on /quota — actually those names live on /api/v2/dashboard (frontend correctly reads has_pro and free_contacts_left from dashboard, not quota). Test adapted to actual contract.
- POST /api/v2/onboarding accepts sectors=array (e.g. ['Paris','Lyon','Marseille']) → 200/201. Persisted via /me.
- GET /r/TESTABCD SPA page → 200.

FRONTEND VERIFIED (mobile 390x844):
- /app-v2 home renders dark obsidian (#040405) theme. Header glass burger (v2-burger) + logo K white + bell (v2-bell). Hero 'Bonjour {Prénom}' with avatar circle (initials + green dot), date FR ('mardi 23 juin'), badge 'PASSER PRO' for free users. data-testid='home-hero-trigger' clickable.
- Tap home-hero-trigger opens .v2-profile-sheet bottom modal with backdrop. Items visible: 'Profil & paramètres' (profile-sheet-settings), 'Passer Pro · 24,99€/mois' (profile-sheet-upgrade), 'Mes notifications' (profile-sheet-notifications), 'Se déconnecter' (profile-sheet-logout in red). Avatar+email+plan label rendered. Drag handle visible at top. Close X works.
- home-daily-advice collapsible: CONSEIL DU JOUR eyebrow, title, chevron animated. Tap expands body, shows AI tip text + 'Continuer la conversation' button (home-tip-continue) + home-tip-history clock icon. Verified continue button renders after expansion (~2.5s wait for /api/v2/ai/daily-tip).
- home-ai-cta is a single compact pill 'Demande à KOLO' with exactly 2 SVG icons (messageCircle + send) — NO duplicates.
- 'Aujourd'hui' section with 2 SVG Activity Rings: home-ring-reminders (stroke=#32D74B green, stroke-dasharray=292.17, dashoffset=292.17 for 0/3, r=46.5) + home-ring-notes (blue). Tap reminders → /app-v2/agenda confirmed. Animation works (transition on dashoffset).
- v2-bottom-nav: position=fixed, bottom=16px, border-radius=999px (PILL/floating ✓). Contains 4 tabs (Accueil, Dossiers, Contacts, Agenda) + central FAB home-mic-fab (64px white/black circle) + 'CRÉER UNE NOTE' label.
- home-mic-fab click opens .v2-modal 'Nouvelle note terrain' AddNoteModal ✓.
- Burger → v2-drawer opens with: KOLO Gratuit/Pro section, quota CONTACTS (10/10) + PROSPECTION (1/1 cette semaine) with progress bars, 'Passer Pro · 24,99€/mois' CTA. Sections FONCTIONNALITÉS (drawer-prospecting, drawer-referral, drawer-guide, drawer-guide-online with external arrow icon), COMPTE (drawer-profile, drawer-contact, drawer-logout). All testids visible=true.
- drawer-guide-online is a <button> (not <a>) with onClick={() => window.open('https://www.trykolo.io/guide', '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')} — works correctly. href/target attrs are null because it's a button — semantically fine but ideally should be an <a target='_blank'> for accessibility/middle-click.
- v2-bell click → /app-v2/notifications page renders with: notif-back arrow, notif-page-title 'Notifications', notif-page-subtitle 'Tu es à jour', RAPPELS DU JOUR section with Agenda link, empty state Bell icon + 'Aucun rappel aujourd'hui' (notif-empty), notif-push-card + 'Gérer dans les paramètres' button (notif-push-settings). All present and visible.
- Onboarding chips (verified via code review in V2OnboardingPage.js line 35-90): SectorPicker component renders <button className='v2-chip'> for each suggestion city + onb-sectors-custom-input + onb-sectors-custom-add button. Selected sectors show with v2-chip-remove (X icon). NO textarea with '69003, 69007, Villeurbanne...' placeholder remains in the file. (Playwright walk-through couldn't auto-navigate to step 5 due to step-specific button selectors not being onb-next, but the JSX confirms the chips implementation).
- Logos /kolo-mark-v5-128.png and /kolo-mark-v5-256.png are accessible.

minor.issue: Field naming inconsistency — returns 'is_pro/contacts_left/contacts_limit' but /api/v2/dashboard returns 'has_pro/free_contacts_left/free_contacts_limit'. Frontend uses dashboard's naming. Consider unifying to one naming convention to avoid confusion (and the review_request mentioned the dashboard names but on /quota path).

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration error in console: '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Outer button data-testid='home-daily-advice' (line 213) contains nested buttons home-tip-continue (line 239) and home-tip-history (line 246). Works visually thanks to e.stopPropagation() but is invalid DOM and will be flagged by SSR/accessibility tools. Fix: change outer <button> to <div role='button' tabIndex={0} onKeyDown={...}> OR split the toggle so only the v2-tip-head is a button and v2-tip-body is a sibling div.

action_items: Fix nested-button hydration error: convert outer <button data-testid='home-daily-advice'> (V2HomePage.js line 213) to <div role='button' tabIndex={0}> OR restructure so v2-tip-head is the only clickable button and v2-tip-body sits as a sibling div outside it. Currently throws a React warning every time home page mounts.

Consider making drawer-guide-online an <a href='https://www.trykolo.io/guide' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'> instead of <button onClick={window.open}> for better a11y (middle-click, copy URL, screen readers).
Optional: unify quota field naming — either rename /api/v2/quota fields to has_pro/free_contacts_* OR document that frontend should keep reading those from /api/v2/dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: V2HomePage.js:213-254 — nested buttons cause React hydration warning (real DOM spec violation). Even though e.stopPropagation guards click bubbling, browsers will reject the outer button's interactive role for the inner controls and screen readers will be confused.
v2_router.py:613-615 vs 651-657 — /dashboard exposes 'has_pro/free_contacts_*' while /quota exposes 'is_pro/contacts_*'. Same business object, two naming conventions in adjacent routes.
V2HomePage.js:258-267 — v2-suggestion-chip uses <span role='button'> but no onKeyDown handler — keyboard users can't activate suggestions.
v2_router.py still ~1285+ lines (carry-over from iter37/38/51/52) — split into quotas.py / ai.py / onboarding.py / prospecting.py / crud.py modules.
drawer-guide-online (V2Layout.js:124) should be <a> with href/target/rel instead of button + window.open — better SEO crawling, a11y, native browser features (open in new tab via middle-click).
test_credentials: Fresh V2 sessions created per test (test53.*@kolo-test.io / test53.ui.*@kolo.io). All onboarded with role='Agent indépendant', annual_revenue='30-60k'. Existing test creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md unchanged.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed. Test creates fresh email/session per case (test53_<uuid>) and lets natural V2 router store data. No cleanup endpoint hit — orphaned test users remain in db.users_v2 / db.v2_onboarding (acceptable, prefixed test53_).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 backend tests pass against the public preview URL. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_53.py -v --tb=short --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_53.xml`. The /api/v2/quota contract is is_pro/contacts_*/prospecting_*_this_week — the review_request mention of has_pro/free_contacts_* applies to /api/v2/dashboard only (frontend wired that way). To test onboarding chips, navigate fresh user to /app-v2/onboarding; the SectorPicker chips live in step 5 (after company info / role / team_size / revenue). Use data-testid='onb-sectors-custom-input' and 'onb-sectors-custom-add' to add custom cities; selected chips render with v2-chip-remove X. Nested-button hydration warning in V2HomePage.js (line 213 outer + 239/246 inner) is the only structural issue — visually it works due to stopPropagation but it's a real DOM spec violation.
rca of the issue: No blocker. ProfileSheet bottom-sheet animation works, Activity Rings stroke-dasharray = 2*π*r ≈ 292.17 with stroke=#32D74B (RAPPELS green) animating offset 292.17→0 as completion increases. Bottom nav is position:fixed bottom:16px border-radius:999px (true floating pill). Drawer external guide link opens trykolo.io/guide in new tab via window.open. The one structural defect — nested <button> inside home-daily-advice — manifests as a React console warning only, not a runtime breakage. Recommend converting outer collapsible to <div role='button'>.
